steps.title: Mark the first list item
steps.content: The sentence lists three towns: Maseno, Ayem, and Jamame. Because Maseno is the first item in the series, it should be followed by a comma before the next town.

steps.title: Reject wrong separators
steps.content: Choice A omits the separator after the first town. Choice B uses a colon without an independent clause before it. Choice C uses a semicolon where a simple list comma is needed. The comma after Maseno fits the series. The answer is D.
